title: sphaerocionium lobatoalatum
intro: Sphaerocionium lobatoalatum is a species of lichen in the family Coccinellaceae, commonly known as a type of crustose lichen. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium lobatoalatum include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Sphaerocionium lobatoalatum can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
